content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(allow_skew30_only)
C: "rule:exp<now=>401" ∧ "skew<=30s" ∧ no_other_grace ∧ bc
H: boundary_offbyone_refresh_loop
P: compare_with_now-30s → keep401_below_edge
V: edge(-30s) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: ! loop_if_lt_included ∧ ! overaccept_if_skew>30
A: fix_edge_cmp

[AUDIT]
Fix allow skew30 only, preserve "rule:exp<now=>401", "skew<=30s", and add a regression test for the 30-second grace window with boundary at minus 30 seconds.
